list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Follows the Mackenzie Shirilla case, a 17-year-old who intentionally crashed her car into a br
list.vod_content: Follows the Mackenzie Shirilla case, a 17-year-old who intentionally crashed her car into a brick wall in Ohio, killing her boyfriend Dominic Russo and his friend Davion Flanagan. She was convicted of 12 felonies.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Saif Ali Khan, who will be seen playing a cop, shared his excitement, â€œKartavya, which is real
list.vod_content: Saif Ali Khan, who will be seen playing a cop, shared his excitement, â€œKartavya, which is really great, produced by Shah Rukh's company Red Chillies Entertainment, is going to come out soon. It's a lovely piece by director Pulkit, and really happy that too is coming out on Netflix.â€‌ The film also features an ensemble cast including Rasika Duggal, Sanjay Mishra, Saurabh Dwivedi, Zakir Hussain, and Manish Chaudhari. Team Kartavya shared - â€œKartavya marks the second collaboration between Red Chillies Entertainment, Netflix, and director Pulkit, following Bhakshak. As a team, we are committed to telling stories that push creative boundaries and resonate deeply, and Kartavya is a powerful reflection of that vision. Set in the heartland, the film explores the complex intersections of law, family, truth, and duty, with Saif delivering remarkable depth and intensity in a morally layered character. We are delighted to partner with Netflix on this journey and look forward to audiences across the world experiencing this gripping and compelling narrative.â€‌ With Kartavya, Red Chillies Entertainment adds another title to its growing slate of content created for global audiences, aligning with Netflixâ€™s vision of showcasing powerful Indian stories to viewers worldwide.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Hamza Ali Mazari, whose real identity is Jaskirat Singh Rangi, pursues his undercover operatio
list.vod_content: Hamza Ali Mazari, whose real identity is Jaskirat Singh Rangi, pursues his undercover operation within Pakistan's criminal world while tracking down Majo.
